creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a problem with crssync: 

```
gmake[4]: *** [src/crssync/CMakeFiles/synccrsdb.dir/build.make:80: src/crssync/CMakeFiles/synccrsdb] Illegal instruction
gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/.build'
gmake[3]: *** [CMakeFiles/Makefile2:6803: src/crssync/CMakeFiles/synccrsdb.dir/all] Error 2
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
```

I have already encountered this problem during my developments. The solution is to do a make clean, and check the dependencies between packages.
